name: Wedgewood Golf Course & Grill
about: Wedgewood Golf & Grill is a 9-hole, par 35 golf course located south of State Highway 21 in Omro, WI. The facility features a full-service grill and bar, offering a family-friendly environment with a menu that includes everything from kids' meals to catered steak dinners. The venue provides both outdoor golf on a tight, challenging course and year-round indoor access via a single golf simulator bay for practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Affordable and accessible golf for all skill levels
Indoor simulator available year-round for practice and play
Full-service kitchen and bar for post-round dining and socializing
Tight course layout provides a challenging and unique on-course experience
Friendly and welcoming atmosphere for golfers and non-golfers alike

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a full menu, including kids' meals, fish & seafood, and catered steak dinners
Full bar available after your round

simulator_hardware.notes: Available for use all year long

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue features a full-service kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes on the simulator, but reservations are scheduled on an hourly basis.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a full menu with kids' meals.
